hero.description: We build custom automations, integrations, and digital presence that give your team back 30+ hours a week — so you can stop firefighting and focus on what actually grows the business.

problemSolution.problemBody: Chasing payments across three apps. Copy-pasting data between systems that should talk to each other. Reconciling transactions in a spreadsheet at midnight. Every hour spent on operational toil is an hour not spent growing your business.
problemSolution.solutionBody: Æther transforms operational chaos into workflows that run while you sleep. Automations that connect every tool in your stack, reconciliation that never misses a cent, and reminders that go out before you even think about them.
problemSolution.cta: Stop wasting time — talk to us

services.label: What we do
services.headline: You didn't start a business
services.description: Every service below comes with receipts — real results from real clients, not numbers from a pitch deck.
services.cta: See what we can do for you

items.name: Custom Automations
items.description: Workflows that run while you sleep. We eliminate every repetitive task in your ops — scheduling, follow-ups, billing, you name it.
items.proof: KrakenBay saves 30+ hours/week on scheduling and billing alone.

items.name: System Integrations
items.description: Your tools should talk to each other. CRM to calendar, payments to accounting, sales to fulfillment — we connect them so data stops falling through the cracks.
items.proof: Inmovilia's sales-to-construction handoff went from days to instant.

items.name: Payment Reconciliation
items.description: Stop reconciling transactions by hand. We automate the matching and verification of every payment across terminals, banks, and platforms.
items.proof: Tavros cut billing cycles by 3x — no more chasing late renewals.

items.name: Digital Presence
items.description: Landing pages, client portals, and portfolio sites built to convert. If your online presence doesn't match the quality of your work, we fix that too.
items.proof: Eternus went from a mismatched page to a portfolio that actually closes clients.

items.name: Process Optimization
items.description: We audit, redesign, and implement workflows that cut bottlenecks and operational costs — measurably, not theoretically.
items.proof: Most clients recover the engagement cost in the first 60 days.

clients.label: Our clients
clients.headline: Don't take our word for it.
clients.rotating: Rotating every 15s — click a name to hold

items.quote: The number of times I forgot to remind my customers about their due payment date was causing me to lose money. The cash floating around, the terminal, tickets, bank apps — I needed all of that to know my in-out expenses. I don't have any clue how they did all of that automatically.
The Æther team helped me reduce what usually took me weeks in reconciliation for each end of the month. Now I can focus on exactly what I care about — bringing more clients to my business.
I needed to get online exposure for my investors. I didn't even have a web page! I contacted them and in a couple of hours I was able to send the link to my investors. They saved me.
They helped me actually have a portfolio for my work. I used to have a meh landing page to showcase my work which wasn't aligned to what I usually do. Now both match!

steps.title: Discover
steps.description: We audit your current workflows end-to-end. Every manual step, every bottleneck, every dollar leaking through the cracks — mapped and quantified.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: We architect automations tailored to your stack. Not a template. Not a generic playbook. A system built around how your business actually runs.

steps.title: Deploy
steps.description: We launch, monitor, and iterate. Your automations run 24/7 while we handle maintenance, optimization, and anything that breaks at 3 AM.

checkFit.label: Is this for you?
checkFit.headline: We're not
checkFit.description: We take on 3 new clients per month so we can go deep, not wide. Here's who gets the most out of working with us.
checkFit.soundLikeYou: Sound like you? We should talk.
audiences: Startups scaling fast with a team too small for the ops workload
Small businesses (gyms, clinics, real estate) buried in admin
Founders who know their time is worth more than data entry
Companies where reconciliation still lives in a spreadsheet

contact.label: Let's talk
contact.headline: Still doing this
contact.description: Tell us what's eating your time and we'll show you exactly where automation saves you hours and money.
contact.submit: Send it. We reply in 24 hours.
contact.success: Thanks — we'll be in touch within 24 hours.

items.a: First automation live within 2–3 weeks of kickoff. Most engagements deliver measurable hours saved inside 30 days — not the 6-month rollouts you'd get from a traditional agency.

items.q: Will this work with our current tools?
items.a: Almost certainly. We connect Stripe, HubSpot, Notion, Airtable, QuickBooks, Slack, Google Workspace, n8n, Zapier, Make, and 100+ others. If your stack has an API or a webhook, we can automate it.

Engagements start around $4,500 and scale with scope. Most clients recover the cost in the first 60 days through reclaimed hours and reduced billing leakage. We share a fixed quote after the free audit — no hourly games.

We monitor every workflow we ship. If something fails at 3 AM, we get paged — not you. Maintenance and small iterations are included in the first 90 days; after that, ongoing support is a flat monthly retainer.
No. We replace the work nobody on your team should be doing. Your people get to focus on customers, growth, and judgment calls — the things software can't do.

Yes. We work inside your accounts (or deploy to your infrastructure), never store credentials in plaintext, and sign an NDA on day one. We can also work under your existing security and compliance requirements.

footer.tagline: Your team's time is too valuable for manual work. We build the automations that handle the boring so you can focus on what actually grows the business.
